name: Akira Kaito
bio: A steadfast guardian of cultural heritage, Akira values stability and continuity. He believes that the wisdom of the past is the foundation for a brighter future.

name: Lena Katsuragi
bio: A visionary entrepreneur, Lena is driven by innovation and progress. She sees change as an opportunity to create a better world.

name: Taro Yamato
bio: A shrewd strategist, Taro excels at finding solutions that balance competing interests. He believes that wisdom lies in experience and pragmatism.
